blocks.badge: Stop. Don't Overpay. · 10-Year Warranty · Beat Any Quote 30%
blocks.subtext:
The answer is simple: we only replace the glass. Your existing window and door frames stay exactly as they are. 

That means no costly frame replacements, no unnecessary structural alterations, and a faster, more affordable upgrade to high-performance double glazing.
blocks.imageAlt: Double glazing upgrade on an existing window in a Melbourne home

items.headline: No Structural Work
items.sub: No demolition, no painting, no plastering. Your frames stay where they are.

items.headline: Suits Most Domestic Frames
items.sub: Custom adaptors fit timber, aluminium, and steel windows.

items.headline: Installed in One Day
items.sub: Most Melbourne homes done by sundown.

items.headline: Up to 70% Quieter
items.sub: Acoustic glass cuts traffic and tram noise.

items.headline: 50–55% Less Heat Loss
items.sub: Compared to standard single glazing — lower bills, warmer rooms.

items.headline: We Beat Any Quote by 30%
items.sub: Send us a real competitor quote. We come in 30% cheaper, in writing, with the 10-year warranty.

blocks.heading: About our adaptors
blocks.mobileSubtitle: Reduces the glass you see by ~40mm in height, 20mm each side. Tap to read more.
blocks.body1: We use special fittings to attach new glass to your existing frame. Our frame reduces the glass size you see by about 40mm overall in height, and 20mm per side, approximately — that is the only visible change. No ripping out, no plastering, no mess.
blocks.body2: This saves you thousands compared to full window replacement.

blocks.heading: Our Process
blocks.subheading: Simple and transparent — from quote to installation.

steps.title: Request a Quote
steps.body: Fill out our online quote form with your measurements and requirements.
steps.imageAlt: Homeowner using the online estimate tool on a phone

steps.title: Review & Proceed
steps.body: If you're happy with the estimate, simply email your quote through to us to proceed.
steps.imageAlt: Homeowner reviewing a double glazing quote online

steps.title: Site Visit
steps.body: We'll contact you to arrange a convenient time for a site inspection and final measure.
steps.imageAlt: Glazier conducting a site inspection and measuring windows

steps.title: Final Confirmation
steps.body: Once all sizes are confirmed, we'll lock everything in and schedule your installation.
steps.callout: Reduces the glass you see by ~40mm in height, 20mm each side. We'll confirm exact measurements on site.
steps.imageAlt: Glazier completing a retrofit double glazing installation

blocks.headline:
Get Your Price.
In Minutes Online.
blocks.subtext: We beat any genuine quote by 30%. That's a promise in writing.
blocks.caption: Enter your window sizes · See your price instantly

faqs.q: Will this fit my existing windows?
faqs.a: Almost always — we retrofit timber, aluminium, and steel frames, and tell you free if yours can't take it.
Most jobs are done in a single day, or two for large homes.
Most Melbourne homes land between $2,400 and $6,000 — use our Instant Estimate for your exact range.
10 years on glass and workmanship, guaranteed in writing on every job.

faqs.q: What if I already have a quote from someone else?
faqs.a: Send us any genuine quote and we'll beat it by 30%, guaranteed in writing.

blocks.body: Call us directly. Free advice, no sales pitch. 25+ years in glazing — we'll give you a straight answer.

blocks.heading: We're glaziers. We do the lot.

blocks.text: We do emergency glass repair across Melbourne.

blocks.name: Tas Markou
blocks.imageAlt: Tas Markou, founder of King Double Glazing
paragraphs: Tas grew up in glass. His father was a glazier and he was doing installs as a kid. Over 25+ years he built and ran two double glazing factories, with 40+ staff at their peak.

Along the way he found a way to drop the price — because most companies charge far more than families can afford. Today he runs King on one promise: transparent quoting, fair pricing, and a 10-year warranty on every job.
blocks.quote: If we can't beat any genuine quote by 30%, I'll tell you straight. Stop. Don't overpay. — Tas
